title: 13 Washington Square
writer: Leroy Scott, Harry O. Hoyt, Walter Anthony
actors: Jean Hersholt, Alice Joyce, George J. Lewis
plot: A leader of New York society leaves her ship bound for Europe ,in disguise as a maid, to prevent her son's marrying into a lower class. Also converging on her home are a crook also disguised (as a deacon) several reporters and the...
